samplingFrame: Core 28-document set drawn from Abraham Lincoln's speeches, letters, and public addresses (1838-1865), fully annotated in lincoln-metaphor-analysis (pipeline_stage_completed: 4 in source manifest). PPW #195 registered 36 documents: 28 confirmed (v3 baseline, present in corpus_manifest.json) plus 8 planned v4 additions identified in LMA #113 but not yet in the source-repo manifest. The v4 target of 48 requires 12 more documents to be specified when LMA #113 is resolved. PPW #196 defined the validation-tier scope (75-100 docs; passage-segmentation-only annotation; 9 candidate categories; specific documents pending LMA #114). PPW #197 defined the reference-tier scope (open-ended count; search indexing only; no annotation; 6 candidate categories including contemporaneous-context documents; specific documents pending LMA #115).
notes: PPW #195 populated documents.json with 36 document entries: 28 confirmed (v3 baseline from corpus_manifest.json) and 8 planned v4 additions from LMA #113. documentCount (28) reflects confirmed pipeline documents; registeredDocumentCount (36) reflects documents.json entries including planned additions. 12 more documents are needed to reach the v4 target of 48; these will be specified when LMA #113 is resolved. PPW #196 defined the validation-tier scope, annotation level (passage segmentation only), reliability use, and nine candidate document categories; specific additional documents pending LMA #114 resolution. PPW #197 defined the reference-tier scope: open-ended count, search-indexing-only annotation level, 6 candidate categories (including contemporaneous-context documents not authored by Lincoln), and authorship exclusion note for scoring runs. Specific documents pending LMA #115 resolution. Raw text import planned for Milestone 16 (PPW #198).
